'''Slorks''' were solitary, omnivorous [[ungulate]]s native to the swamps of [[Kidron/Legends|Kidron]], but also found on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. They vaguely resembled [[swine]], and were fiercely territorial. While they seldom engaged in predation, they scavenged on the remains of [[quamin]] [[Death/Legends|kills]]. They also ate industrial waste and garbage, and were themselves immune to predation due to their own stench. The primary sense they relied on to perceive environment was smell, facilitated by a large snout.
